channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NCAA clarifies Air Peace London flight disruption, assures passengers were supported
item.description: The Nigerian Civil Aviation Authority (NCAA) don clear Air Peace matter wey cause gbege on social media over im London flight wey get wahala recently. Some videos and reports claim sey passengers bin ...

item.title: Labor defends tax reforms in Budget 2026, opposition criticises changes to negative gearing and CGT
item.description: The 2026 Australian federal budget has sparked a mix of political and public reactions, particularly around changes to negative gearing and capital gains tax (CGT). Former Labor leader Bill Shorten, n...

item.title: Five individuals, including two Pakistanis, remanded in Jammu for terror-related offences
item.description: In Jammu, a local court on Monday remanded five individuals, including two Pakistani nationals, to 25-day judicial custody in connection with a National Investigation Agency (NIA) case involving terro...

item.title: LSK Seeks Full Participation in Supreme Court Cybercrime Law Appeal
item.description: The Law Society of Kenya (LSK) has applied to be recognised as a main party in the Supreme Court appeal challenging parts of the Computer Misuse and Cybercrimes Act (CMCA). Originally joining the High...

item.title: Senator Tulfo urges review of safety measures for Filipino seafarers in high-risk areas
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Senator Raffy Tulfo has proposed a resolution to strengthen the safety protocols and monitoring systems for Filipino seafarers working in high-risk maritime regions. Highlighting...

item.title: An Expert Review of the 2026 International Booker Prize Shortlist
item.description: The 2026 International Booker Prize shortlist showcases six novels of exceptional creativity and literary innovation, spanning diverse geographical and historical settings. Taiwan Travelogue by Yáng S...

item.title: AIADMK Rebels Extend Support to TVK Ahead of Tamil Nadu Assembly Floor Test
item.description: Ahead of the Tamil Nadu Assembly floor test scheduled for May 13, 2026, a faction of AIADMK MLAs led by former Ministers S.P. Velumani and C.Ve. Shanmugam declared their support for the ruling Tamilag...

item.title: Ensuring patient safety and privacy in AI healthcare systems
item.description: The article discusses the growing use of artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare and highlights the critical need to prioritise patient safety and privacy. Globally, AI is being deployed to help wi...

item.title: BoT Promotes Financial Inclusion for Tanzanian MSMEs
item.description: Dar es Salaam — The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) is working hard to make sure micro, small and medium enterprises (MSMEs) can easily get financial services. During a meeting in Arusha with the Global Standa...

item.title: Joshi and Chogo Lead Winners at DGC Mother's Day Golf Event in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Over the weekend, more than 90 golfers gathered at the Dar es Salaam Gymkhana Club (DGC) for the Mother's Day Golf Tournament. Despite rainy conditions, the event brought together both...

item.title: Vijay Faces Trust Vote Amid Coalition Friction Over Astrologer Appointment, Gains Support from AIADMK Rebels
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay, just a few days into office, is already navigating early political challenges. The appointment of astrologer Rickey Radhan Pandit Vettrivel as Officer on Spec...

item.title: Trump Administration Promotes Fertility Policies Amid Criticism Over Approach
item.description: The Trump administration, through initiatives like Moms.gov and recent maternal health events, has emphasized policies aimed at increasing fertility rates in the United States. These efforts include e...

item.title: ANCYL urges unemployed youth to submit CVs before Ramaphosa addresses Youth Day
item.description: The ANC Youth League (ANCYL) has announced that President Cyril Ramaphosa will not be allowed to address attendees at the June 16 Youth Day celebrations unless unemployed young people submit their CVs...

item.title: Stella Gives Katherine Heartfelt Advice on Love in 'The Alibi' Episode 40
item.description: In Episode 40 of the popular ABS-CBN series 'The Alibi,' Stella Morales offers heartfelt advice to Katherine Morales about love and relationships. The scene highlights Stella's role as a mentor figure...

item.title: Muhammad Ali Spars Gently with Young Fan During 1963 London Training
item.description: On June 6, 1963, in a small London gym, six-year-old Patrick Power was taking boxing lessons to defend himself against schoolyard bullies. That day became unforgettable when Muhammad Ali, then known a...

item.title: Search continues for missing swimmer at Trigg Beach
item.description: Authorities in Western Australia are continuing their search for a swimmer who went missing near Trigg Beach, specifically at the area known as The Blue Hole. The emergency call was made shortly after...

item.title: Yoweri Museveni Begins Seventh Term as Uganda’s President Amid Succession Talks
item.description: Uganda’s long-serving leader, Yoweri Museveni, has officially kicked off another five-year term after a colourful swearing-in ceremony held at Kololo Ceremonial Grounds in Kampala. The event drew seve...

item.title: Man sentenced for posing as a mute wheelchair user to commit sexual offences
item.description: A man convicted of paedophilic offences has been sentenced to prison after it was revealed he pretended to be a mute wheelchair user in order to carry out his crimes. The individual exploited this fal...

item.title: Calgary City Council Discusses Pay for New Water Oversight Board
item.description: Calgary’s mayor, Jeromy Farkas, has defended the proposed compensation for the newly established Water Utility Oversight Board, describing it as 'money well spent' despite some concerns from city coun...

item.title: Linet Toto Emotional During Community Event as Bomet Residents Show Support
item.description: Bomet woman representative Linet Toto Chepkorir was visibly emotional during a recent community gathering as residents cheered her re-election campaign. Accompanied by her husband, Godfrey Kimutai, an...
